title: context allowed_reads cap max 5
purpose: E4.3 defines context allowed reads cap max 5 for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness.
scope: Owns `E4.3` only; siblings under `E4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §7 — Branch E — Knowledge & composition plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#7-branch-e-knowledge-composition-plane).
behavior_steps: After H1 plan approval, each pursuit wake begins with S0 preflight via A2.1 before the conductor routes any product or platform work.
When preflight reports ready, the conductor executes exactly one pipeline step per turn—implement, design, or platform—then dual-writes journal and state.json before the next wake.
Every K product turns, autopilot schedules a platform queue drain per D3.1 so Plane D promotion and catalog curation advance alongside the active goal.
On scope completion, pursuit runs goal_verify, transitions to verifying, and requests H3 on pass per A2.5.
If preflight finds blockers, budget limits, or goal_verify failure, pursuit stops at H2 with structured notes rather than advancing the queue or marking work complete silently.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `E4.3` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `E4.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `E4.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_e4_3.py when script exists.
Validate `E4.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.

Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `E4.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: E4.3 defines context allowed reads cap max 5 for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness. In practice, the system after h1 plan approval, each pursuit wake begins with s0 preflight via a2.1 before the conductor routes any product or platform work, then when preflight reports ready, the conductor executes exactly one pipeline step per turn—implement, design, or platform—then dual-writes journal and state.json before the next wake.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-e 2026-06-28 -->

`allowed_reads` caps worker and Librarian context at five paths—hard bound on scope expansion. Librarian returns the cap; conductors pass it unchanged in spawn contracts; workers must not read outside the list except via declared tool output.

The cap forces compose and catalog search to prioritize ([E2.1](E2.1-compose-resolve-capability-needed.md)–[E2.4](E2.4-compose-plan-task-card-components.md)) instead of loading entire design trees. Conductor may read more than workers but should still prefer INDEX and task cards. Violations are scope-bleed failure class; orchestrate-subagents enforces in worker prompts.
